arts.ttl: Napoli hold initial talks for Feyenoord’s Igor Paixao
arts.sum: Khvicha Kvaratskhelia gained an almost demigod-like status at Napoli, a lot of which has subsequently disappeared by him leaving for PSG this January, in the middle of a season where…

arts.ttl: NAPOLI vs. FIORENTINA UNDER THE SPOTLIGHT
arts.sum: Lukaku, however, has only scored in the penalty-area, five goals with his left-foot, one header and three penalties, statistics which show how he is the reference point for the Napoli attack. The long-distance battle between Lukaku and Kean, the two centre-forwards with similar numbers but different characteristics, is one of the focal points of the clash.

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku SLAMS Chelsea owners: 'They wore me down'
arts.sum: Napoli forward Romelu Lukaku has opened up on his disastrous second spell at Chelsea following his permanent departure last summer. Lukaku was subsequently loaned back to Inter Milan in 2022, before a second loan spell away from Chelsea followed during the 2023-24 campaign - this time at AS Roma.

arts.ttl: Romelu Lukaku slams way Chelsea treated him and two other Blues players - 'I've seen things'
arts.sum: Romelu Lukaku rejoined Chelsea in a bumper £98m move in the summer of 2021, but after a strong start he soon faded from favour, and the Belgian has blasted the club for how they treated him
